positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard/home page with an active session
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed with username and password fields
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is redirected away from the login page
Verify the dashboard or home page is displayed
Verify the authenticated user session is active (e.g., username or profile icon is visible)
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid username and password

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully logged in, confirming the email field is case-insensitive
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Enter 'TESTD1051@GMAIL.COM' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
Verify no error message is displayed
Verify the authenticated session is active
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with email address containing uppercase letters

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is blocked and a validation error message indicating the username/email field is required is displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Leave the email/username field completely empty
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed (e.g., 'Email is required' or 'Username is required')
negative_scenarios.title: Login fails when username field is left empty

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is blocked and a validation error message indicating the password field is required is displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Leave the password field completely empty
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed (e.g., 'Password is required')
negative_scenarios.title: Login fails when password field is left empty
